<figure class="kg-card kg-nft-card">
  <a class="kg-nft-card-container" href="https://opensea.io/assets/example/1">
    <div class="kg-nft-image-container">
      <img class="kg-nft-image" src="https://cdn.test/nft.jpg" alt="">
    </div>
    <div class="kg-nft-metadata">
      <div class="kg-nft-title">Sample NFT</div>
      <div class="kg-nft-creator">by example</div>
    </div>
  </a>
</figure>
